landing.hero_subtitle: MeineMemoiren transforms your loved ones' memories into a beautiful book with QR-code voice playback.
landing.step1_desc: Order the package and set up a profile for your storyteller.
landing.step2_desc: Your storyteller receives a weekly question via WhatsApp or SMS — no login required.
landing.step3_desc: Record with one click. Our AI transforms the recording into a beautiful story.
landing.step4_desc: After 6 months, hold a printed book in your hands — with QR codes to listen.
landing.price_includes: Includes 52 weekly questions, AI text editing, and a printed book
landing.faq_q1: Does my storyteller need a smartphone?
landing.faq_a1: Yes, a smartphone with WhatsApp or SMS reception is enough. No app needed.
landing.faq_a2: All recordings are securely stored in the EU and only used for your family book.
landing.faq_a3: Yes, you can review and adjust all AI-edited texts in the dashboard.

onboarding.title: Set up your storyteller
onboarding.subtitle: Tell us about the person whose stories you want to preserve.
